concepts.label: Energy
concepts.definition: Capacity to do work or produce change

concepts.label: Temperature
concepts.definition: Measure of how hot or cold something is

concepts.label: Speed
concepts.definition: Rate at which an object moves

concepts.label: Light
concepts.definition: Electromagnetic radiation visible to the human eye

concepts.label: Sound
concepts.definition: Vibrations that travel through air and are detected by the ear

concepts.label: Color
concepts.definition: Visual perception of different wavelengths of light

concepts.label: Metal
concepts.definition: Solid material that conducts heat and electricity

concepts.label: Wood
concepts.definition: Hard fibrous material from trees used in construction

concepts.label: Glass
concepts.definition: Hard transparent material made from melted sand

concepts.label: Plastic
concepts.definition: Synthetic material that can be molded into various shapes

concepts.label: Gold
concepts.definition: Precious yellow metal used in jewelry and as currency

concepts.label: Iron
concepts.definition: Common metal used in construction and manufacturing

concepts.label: Diamond
concepts.definition: Extremely hard crystalline form of carbon

concepts.label: Human
concepts.definition: Intelligent bipedal primate species (Homo sapiens)

concepts.label: Animal
concepts.definition: Multicellular organism that consumes organic matter

concepts.label: Plant
concepts.definition: Multicellular organism that produces energy through photosynthesis

concepts.label: Vehicle
concepts.definition: Machine used to transport people or goods

concepts.label: Food
concepts.definition: Substance consumed to provide nutritional support for the body

concepts.label: Cooking
concepts.definition: Process of preparing food by heating

concepts.label: Education
concepts.definition: Process of facilitating learning and acquiring knowledge

concepts.label: Healthcare
concepts.definition: Organized provision of medical care to individuals

concepts.label: Transportation
concepts.definition: Movement of people and goods from one place to another
